outline.title: AR Sound: -ar- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ar- words: card, farm, star, car. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: OR Sound: -or- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -or- words: born, horn, north, short. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: ER Sound: -er- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -er- words: ruler, dancer, bakery, soccer. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: IR Sound: -ir- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ir- words: stir, dirt, shirt, birthday. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: UR Sound: -ur- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ur- words: fur, burn, surf, purse. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Can You Read These Words? Phonics Review!
outline.summary: Phonics review game slide with all 20 words from today's phonics lesson for students to practice reading.
